spec.name: The End Of The Maze
spec.description: You have solved the maze. You can tell by the last few moves that there is no way that a dumb worker could have figured that out. It seems pretty desolate here. To the south is a bleak room. To the north, you see the maze. There is a sign above the south exit: THOSE WHO ENTER, PLAN ON A TIMELY DEATH. (ESPECIALLY IF YOU'RE LOYAL TO THE QUEEN)
